title: Deliciously Smoky Australian Shrimp Skewers
description: A romantic Australian dish featuring ginger garlic paste and smoky binchotan-charcoal flavor, this recipe is perfect for a special occasion, the combination of shrimp, ginger, and garlic will transport your taste buds to the coast of Australia
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, making sure the binchotan charcoal is ready for smoking.
Thread the shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
In a small bowl, mix together the ginger garlic paste, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture onto both sides of the shrimp.
Place the skewers on the grill and smoke for 2 minutes per side, or until the shrimp are pink and cooked through.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for 1 minute.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh parsley or lemon wedges if desired.
